data.title: Kraig Biocraft Laboratories Shatters Production Record, Delivering Over 1.3 Metric Tons of Spider Silk Cocoons in a Single Month, A 5X Increase Over Previous High
data.description: In just one month, Kraig Labs (OTCQB: KBLB) successfully manufactured a record-breaking amount of spider silk cocoons, totaling over 1.3 tons. This achievement marks a significant milestone in industrial-scale production of spider silk and showcases a substantial leap in their capabilities.

data.title: urban-gro, Inc. Outlines Strategy Targeting Global T20 Cricket Market and Near-Term Execution Milestones
data.description: In Lafayette, Colorado on April 6, 2026, urban-gro, Inc. (Nasdaq: UGRO) shared an investor presentation through a Current Report on Form 8-K. The focus was on their strategic plans related to the global T20 cricket sector - an industry with notable media rights deals, franchise expansion, and increasing worldwide viewer participation. This move highlights the company's interest in leveraging opportunities within the thriving T20 cricket market.

data.title: Scinai Completes Strategic Reorganization to Establish Dedicated CDMO Platform and Lean R&D Structure; Outlines 2026 Priorities
data.description: In Jerusalem on April 6, 2026, Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. revealed the successful conclusion of a strategic milestone. The company, listed on NASDAQ as SCNI, specializes in developing therapies for inflammation and immunology while also managing a expanding CDMO sector.

data.title: Solstice Advanced Materials to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Solstice Advanced Materials, trading as SOLS on NASDAQ, announced that they will release their first quarter financial results on May 6, 2026, before the market opens. The company plans to host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results.

data.title: OLD REPUBLIC FORMS NEW PROPERTY INSURANCE COMPANY
data.description: Chicago-based Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) revealed its establishment of a new subsidiary, Old Republic Property, Inc. The new company is set to provide specialized property insurance products through a nationwide network of retail brokers. This move signifies the company's expansion into a new market segment, consolidating its position and potentially increasing its revenue streams.

data.title: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. Commences Consent Solicitation Relating to its Senior Secured Notes
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. began a consent solicitation for its senior secured notes. The company, traded on NYSE as CCO, initiated this process to address its outstanding notes. This move marks an important step for Clear Channel in managing its financial commitments.

data.title: Broadridge Live with On-Chain Governance for Tokenized Equities, Extending Market Infrastructure into Digital Assets
data.description: Galaxy is leading the way by granting full ownership rights to both traditional and tokenized assets, with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. announcing on April 6, 2026, the expansion of its governance platform to accommodate digital assets. This development allows for greater transparency and control over investments, empowering individuals and businesses alike. In this groundbreaking move, Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (NYSE: BR) showcases its commitment to navigating the evolving landscape of finance, signaling a significant step towards the future of asset management.

data.title: Cycore Helps Home Intelligence Platform, Cocoon, Achieve 100% SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance in Three Weeks
data.description: A cybersecurity company based in Miami has intervened during the observation period to address compliance issues and ensure the continuity of a vital certification process. The AI-driven firm, Cycore, revealed on April 6, 2026, that they have effectively concluded a SOC 2 assessment.

data.title: Spin Master Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Spin Master Corp., a prominent global children's entertainment company listed on TSX under TOY, revealed plans for a conference call regarding their first quarter 2026 performance. The call is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. (ET). This communication aims to dissect the company's recent quarter figures and provide insights into its financial standing.

data.title: Neurocrine to Acquire Soleno Therapeutics, Expanding Its Endocrinology and Rare Disease Portfolio
data.description: VYKAT™ XR, a medication containing diazoxide choline, has been approved by the FDA as the initial and singular treatment for hyperphagia in Prader-Willi Syndrome. This approval marks a significant advancement in therapy for this condition. VYKAT™ XR joins Neurocrine's selection of innovative medications, which now consists of three first-in-class drugs, including INGREZZA® (valbenazine). This expansion in Neurocrine's commercial portfolio emphasizes their commitment to developing groundbreaking treatments for various medical conditions.
